backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the school website backend with news management, contact message submission, user profiles, and role-based access control (admin/user) using a MixinAuthorization pattern.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the second gallery image in Home.tsx was replaced with the campus corridor asset at /assets/generated/campus-corridor.dim_800x600.jpg using object-fit cover.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, pages, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, About, Admissions, Academics, StudentLife, News, Contact, and Admin pages, all wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Contact form component with Name, Current Class, Email, and Your Question fields, client-side validation, and backend submission via the useSubmitContactMessage hook, mapping class to subject and question to message.
frontend/src/components/ContactMessagesP: Admin panel component that fetches and displays contact form submissions sorted by newest first, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states.
frontend/src/components/DepartmentCard.t: Reusable card component displaying a department's icon, title, description, and a list of key courses with chevron bullets and a hover color transition on the top accent bar.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component that wraps all pages with a sticky navigation header, top contact/social bar, and footer. Handles mobile menu, scroll effects, authentication state display, and renders the ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing loading state during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NewsCard.tsx: Displays a single news item as a card with a placeholder image, formatted date, title, summary, and a 'Read More' button.
frontend/src/components/NewsManagementPa: Admin panel for viewing existing news articles and submitting new ones via a validated form, using React Query mutations and displaying a list of current items with skeleton loading.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that appears after login when a user has no profile, prompting them to enter their name to complete initial profile setup.
frontend/src/components/StaffCard.tsx: Displays a staff member's avatar (initials-based), name, role, department badge, and bio in a styled card with hover color transitions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity and an optional admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including news items, contact info, user profiles, and admin messages via the actor interface.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for a water-blue/red color palette in light and dark modes, plus shared utility component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page displaying the school's story, mission, and core values (Curiosity, Respect, Integrity, Excellence) using cards and decorative layout sections.
frontend/src/pages/Academics.tsx: Academics page showcasing three department areas (Science & Tech, Humanities & Commerce, Exam Prep) with highlights stats and curriculum description.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page (authentication-gated) with tabbed UI for adding news items and viewing contact messages fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Admissions.tsx: Admissions page outlining a four-step application journey and listing required documents, with links to the contact page.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying school contact details (phone, email, address, hours) alongside an embedded ContactForm component, with a styled page header.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero section, stats, feature highlights, announcements, testimonials, a photo gallery, and a news preview section fetched via useGetAllNews.
frontend/src/pages/News.tsx: News listing page with a search input that filters news items fetched from the API, displaying results in a responsive grid with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/pages/StudentLife.tsx: Student Life page showcasing extracurricular activities (sports, arts, tech, debate) in a card grid with tags, plus a page header and intro section.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom font families, an extended color palette (school-blue, school-red, school-cream) using OKLCH values, and dark mode class support.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 13) for Doon's Public School website, documenting existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and design requirements including Internet Identity login, admin portal, and water blue + red theme.
